error_signature: master workflow does not trigger on sub-workflow error
title: Master workflow fails to trigger on sub-workflow errors
symptom: When an error occurs in a sub-workflow, the master workflow's error handling does not activate, leading to unhandled errors.
not_this_if: Error handling is correctly configured in the sub-workflow
root_cause: The master workflow's error handling is not triggered by errors occurring in sub-workflows when 'Wait For Sub-Workflow Completion' is enabled. This is a known limitation in the current n8n version.
fix_steps: Enable 'Continue On Fail' on the execute sub-workflow node
Alternatively, add an error reporter flow in the sub-workflow settings
agent_instruction: Enable 'Continue On Fail' in the sub-workflow node settings or add an error reporter flow.
